content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "cAPS lOCK". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/131/A
constraints: The length of the string is between 1 and 100
The string only contains English letters

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Check if the first character is uppercase and the rest are lowercase, then convert the string to all uppercase if true, otherwise check if the string is all uppercase and convert to lowercase if true, otherwise return the original string
